name: Flygon Delta Storm
description: A Dragon Frontiers deck featuring Flygon ex δ's Sand Damage body for bench pressure and Psychic Pulse for spread damage. Uses Vibrava δ's Psychic Wing for mobility.

cards.name: Trapinch δ
cards.role: Basic for Flygon line, Sand Tomb tech

cards.name: Vibrava δ
cards.role: Stage 1 with Psychic Wing body for free retreat

cards.name: Flygon ex δ
cards.role: Main attacker with Sand Damage body

cards.name: Pinsir δ
cards.role: Armor body tank for early game

notes: Tests Poke-Bodies that trigger between turns (Sand Damage), retreat cost modification (Psychic Wing), and spread damage attacks.
